mapper.select: SELECT category, COUNT(*) as count, SUM(amount) as totalAmount, AVG(amount) as avgAmount FROM consumption_record GROUP BY category ORDER BY totalAmount DESC

SELECT DATE(create_time) as date, COUNT(*) as count, SUM(amount) as totalAmount FROM consumption_record WHERE DATE(create_time) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(amount), 0) FROM consumption_record WHERE DATE(create_time) = #{today}
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(amount), 0) FROM consumption_record WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(amount), 0) FROM consumption_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND DATE(create_time) = #{today}
SELECT category, COUNT(*) as count, SUM(amount) as totalAmount, AVG(amount) as avgAmount FROM consumption_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY category ORDER BY totalAmount DESC

SELECT DATE(create_time) as date, COUNT(*) as count, SUM(amount) as totalAmount FROM consumption_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND DATE(create_time) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY date ASC
